title: Beta Nether 2.0
description: Reverts the Nether back to its original form!
body:
# **Beta Nether 2.0**

**Update: This mod will no longer be updated, here is a maintained but slightly different version - https://modrinth.com/datapack/legacy-nether-modrinth**

## **Description**

**Beta Nether** is a mod that aims to recreate the Nether terrain that existed **before** the 1.16 update. This mod is intended for people who want to revisit the old Nether Dimension of Minecraft again.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UFaQCz_GTgc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **Features**

You can still find and play with the new features such as the **Bastion Remnants** and the **Crimson** and **Warped fungus** spawning inside Nether Fortress chests.

## **Nostalgia**

For the best nostalgic experience, I recommend using the **[Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks)** mod by **Adrenix** which includes many faithful recreations of old minecraft features alonside the **[Golden Days](https://github.com/PoeticRainbow/golden-days/releases)** resource pack by **PoeticRainbow**. Additionally, using the **[Modern Beta](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modern-beta)** mod by **b3spectacled** brings back the old nostalgic terrain generation.

## **Just Beta Nether**

Don't want any of the newer minecraft nether features? Check out my other mod, just beta nether, which disables all of the new mobs, structures, and loot tables: https://modrinth.com/mod/just-beta-nether

## **Datapack**

If you would like to use this mod for specific worlds only, I've made a datapack for that: https://modrinth.com/datapack/beta-nether

## **Support**

If you have questions or any issues with the mod, you can report them in our discord server: https://discord.com/invite/mMMm2t227B!
